ui.elementHint: Choose an element that counters the monster for maximum damage
ui.classUnlockHint: Equip 4 skills according to the set to unlock the class

battleResult.defeatMessage: It's okay... Take a rest and try again!

achievement.title: Achievements
achievement.subtitle: Your goals and accomplishments
achievement.footer: Unlock achievements to receive special rewards in the future

spark-burst.name: Spark Burst
spark-burst.description: 25% chance to attack again for 100% damage (increases to 40% if player is Neutral element) +2% chance and +3% damage per level

blade-dance.name: Blade Dance
blade-dance.description: Increase ATK by 20% (increases to 35% if player is Neutral element) +3% per level
blade-dance.log: ⚔️ Blade Dance Lv.{{level}} increases ATK by {{percent}}% (+{{atk}} ATK)!

aegis-guard.name: Aegis Guard
aegis-guard.description: 35% chance to reduce damage by 50% (increases to 55% if player is Neutral element) +1.5% per level
aegis-guard.log: 🛡️ Aegis Guard Lv.{{level}} reduces damage by {{percent}}%!

calm-focus.name: Calm Focus
calm-focus.description: Regenerate 1% of max HP per turn (increases to 2% if Neutral element) +0.5% per level
calm-focus.log: ✨ Calm Focus Lv.{{level}} regenerates {{percent}}% of max HP

blazing-soul.name: Blazing Soul
blazing-soul.description: Increase ATK by 10% (increases to 20% if player is Fire element) +1.5% per level

tidal-grace.name: Tidal Grace
tidal-grace.description: Regenerate 2% of max HP per turn (5% if player is Water element) +0.3% per level

stone-skin.name: Stone Skin
stone-skin.description: Increase DEF by 10% (25% if player is Earth element) +3% per level

tailwind-strike.name: Tailwind
tailwind-strike.description: 10% chance to double attack (30% if player is Wind element) +1% per level
tailwind-strike.log: 🌪️ Tailwind Lv.{{level}} prepares double attack! ({{chance}}% chance)

holy-aura.name: Holy Aura
holy-aura.description: Reduce damage taken by 10% (25% if player is Light element) +1.5% per level
holy-aura.log: ☀️ Holy Aura Lv.{{level}} reduces damage by {{percent}}%!

dark-pact.name: Dark Pact
dark-pact.description: Increase ATK by 30% (+3% per level) but reduce DEF by 10% (+2% per level) No DEF penalty if player is Dark element
dark-pact.log: 🌙 Dark Pact Lv.{{level}} ATK +{{atk}}%{{def, select, true{ (DEF -{{def}}%)} other{}}})!

vitality-boost.name: Vitality Boost
vitality-boost.description: Increase max HP by 15% (+2% per level) Effect doubles if player is Neutral element

gold-finder.name: Gold Finder
gold-finder.description: Gain 10% more Gold after battles +2% per level
gold-finder.log: ⭐ Gold Finder Lv.{{level}}: Gain +{{percent}}% more Gold!

fire-ember.name: Fire Ember
fire-ember.description: 15% chance to deal additional 50% ATK damage (increases to 25% if player is Fire element) +2% per level
fire-ember.log: 🔥 Fire Ember Lv.{{level}} {{chance}}% chance for +{{dmg}} bonus damage!

water-purify.name: Water Purify
water-purify.description: Remove Poison and restore 8% of max HP instantly (increases to 12% if player is Water element) +1% per level
water-purify.log: 💧 Water Purify Lv.{{level}} restores +{{heal}} HP ({{percent}}%) and removes negative status

earth-wall.name: Earth Wall
earth-wall.description: Increase DEF by 20% but reduce ATK by 5% (no ATK penalty if player is Earth element) +2% per level
earth-wall.log: 🛡️ Earth Wall Lv.{{level}} DEF +{{def}}%{{atk, select, true{ (ATK -{{atk}}%)} other{}}})!

wind-dash.name: Wind Dash
wind-dash.description: 20% chance to dodge attack and counter with 50% ATK damage (increases to 30% if player is Wind element) +2% per level
wind-dash.log: 💨 Wind Dash Lv.{{level}} {{chance}}% dodge chance | {{counter}}% ATK counter

light-blessing.name: Light Blessing
light-blessing.description: Regenerate 5% of max HP per turn and increase ATK by 10% (increases to 15% if player is Light element) +1% per level
light-blessing.log: ☀️ Light Blessing Lv.{{level}} regenerates +{{heal}} HP/turn ATK +{{atk}}%

dark-corruption.name: Dark Corruption
dark-corruption.description: Reduce enemy DEF by 15% (+1% per level) but lose 3% HP per turn (no HP loss if player is Dark element)
dark-corruption.log: 🌙 Dark Corruption Lv.{{level}} reduces enemy DEF by {{def}}%{{hp, select, true{ (lose {{hp}}%/turn)} other{}}})!

critical-strike.name: Critical Strike
critical-strike.description: 8% chance to deal 200% damage (Critical) +1% per level

critical-mastery.name: Critical Mastery
critical-mastery.description: Increase critical damage by 20% (+5% per level)
critical-mastery.log: ⚡ Critical Mastery Lv.{{level}} increases critical damage by +{{bonus}}%!

lifesteal-vamp.name: Vampiric Touch
lifesteal-vamp.description: 30% chance to lifesteal starting at 15% (+2% per level) of damage dealt
lifesteal-vamp.log: 🩸 Vampiric Touch Lv.{{level}} ({{chance}}% chance) lifesteal {{percent}}% (+{{heal}} HP)

armor-penetration.name: Armor Penetration
armor-penetration.description: Ignore enemy DEF starting at 30% (+2% per level) but reduce ATK by 10%

elemental-mastery.name: Elemental Mastery
elemental-mastery.description: Awaken hidden elemental powers: Massively increase ATK, DEF, and HP based on skill level (Neutral element receives stronger bonuses)

skills.findSkillByDefeating:
Find this skill by defeating
powerful monsters
skills.noSkillsFound: No skills found in this category

whisperingForest.name: Whispering Forest
whisperingForest.description: A deep forest where monsters start getting fierce and fast

shadowPlains.name: Shadow Plains
shadowPlains.description: Wide plains filled with archers and fierce beasts

crystalMountains.name: Crystal Mountains
crystalMountains.description: High mountains filled with powerful mages and beasts

infernoWastelands.name: Inferno Wastelands
infernoWastelands.description: Lands destroyed by fire and dark power

celestialRealm.name: Celestial Realm
celestialRealm.description: Sacred lands filled with deities and ultimate beasts

eternalPeaks.name: Eternal Peaks
eternalPeaks.description: The end of adventure filled with ultimate challenges

wizardTower.name: Wizard Tower
wizardTower.description: Home of powerful mages and bosses

classes.title: Classes
classes.subtitle: Equip 4 skills according to the set to unlock the class

bloodlust.name: Bloodlust
bloodlust.description: When HP drops below 30%, instantly gain 20% increased attack power!

thorns.name: Thorn Reflection
thorns.description: 10% chance to reflect damage back to attacking enemies!

arcaneEcho.name: Arcane Echo
arcaneEcho.description: Every 3 turns, create massively increased damage!

battleLog.statusUp: 📈 Status Up: HP+{{hp}}, ATK+{{atk}}, DEF+{{def}} (Full Heal!)
battleLog.criticalHit: {{attacker}} ⚔ CRITICAL HIT! ⚔ Strikes {{target}} for {{dmg}} damage! (x{{mult}}) (Remaining: {{hpLeft}} HP)
battleLog.doubleAttack: 🌪️ DOUBLE ATTACK! 🌪️ {{attacker}} unleashes a devastating combo on {{target}}! -{{dmg}} HP (Remaining: {{hpLeft}} HP)
battleLog.defeat: 💀 Defeated... You were killed by {{name}}! (Monster HP: {{monsterHpLeft}})
